title: Quotes randomisation on refresh, remove 6th memory photo, and audio updates for Home & Our Memories

requirements.summary: Randomise quote and fun fact on every page refresh in QuotesPage.tsx
acceptanceCriteria: Navigating to or refreshing the Quotes & Fun Facts page shows a randomly selected quote each time.
Navigating to or refreshing the Quotes & Fun Facts page shows a randomly selected fun fact each time.
The random pick is seeded by the current timestamp or Math.random() so it differs across refreshes.

file_operations.description: Modify the component to automatically invalidate and refetch both quote and fun fact data on mount using useEffect, ensuring fresh random values appear on every page load or refresh without requiring user interaction with the refresh button.

requirements.summary: Remove the 6th image from the Our Memories photo gallery
acceptanceCriteria: The Our Memories gallery renders one fewer photo than before.
The photo that was previously in the 6th position is no longer visible.
All remaining photos display and open in the lightbox correctly.

file_operations.description: Remove the 6th photo (index 5, zero-based) from the curated photo array that defines the gallery images, ensuring the remaining photos continue to display correctly in the masonry grid and lightbox modal.

requirements.summary: Add continuous looping background BGM on the Home page using Doremon_theme audio file
acceptanceCriteria: Opening or navigating to the Dashboard/Home page automatically starts playing Doremon_theme in a loop.
The BGM pauses or stops when navigating away from the Home page.
The audio file path resolves to /assets/audio/Doremon_theme (with its original extension).
Music does not double-play if the user returns to the Home page while it is already running.

file_operations.description: Add a useEffect hook that creates an Audio element pointing to /assets/audio/Doremon_theme (with the correct file extension), sets it to loop, plays it on mount, and pauses/cleans it up on unmount when navigating away from the Dashboard. Ensure the audio doesn't overlap if the component remounts while already playing.

requirements.summary: Play VID_20260301_052016.MP4 audio on click of the central Doraemon image on Home page
acceptanceCriteria: Clicking the central Doraemon image on the Dashboard page plays VID_20260301_052016.MP4.
Each click restarts the audio from the beginning.
The audio file path resolves correctly from the public assets directory.

file_operations.description: Add a click handler to the central Doraemon hero image that creates or reuses an Audio element pointing to /assets/audio/VID_20260301_052016.MP4, resets currentTime to 0, and plays the audio from the start on each click.

requirements.summary: Automatically play VID_20260301_052623.MP4 audio once when entering Our Memories page
acceptanceCriteria: Navigating to the Our Memories page automatically plays VID_20260301_052623.MP4.
The sound plays once (non-looping) on page entry.
The audio stops and is cleaned up when the user navigates away from Our Memories.
The audio file path resolves correctly from the public assets directory.

file_operations.description: Add a useEffect hook that creates an Audio element pointing to /assets/audio/VID_20260301_052623.MP4, plays it once (non-looping) on mount, and pauses/cleans it up on unmount when the user navigates away from the page.
